sentences.sentence: It is an unfortunate fact that over the past 20 pars, around 260 million people a year have been affected by natural disasters around the world.
sentences.translation: 令人遗憾的是，在过去20年间，全世界每年约有2.6亿人受到自然灾害的影响。

structure.text: It is an unfortunate fact
that over the past 20 pars, around 260 million people a year have been affected by natural disasters around the world
over the past 20 pars
around 260 million people a year
have been affected by natural disasters around the world

difficult_points: It is a fact that...是形式主语结构，that 从句是 fact 的同位语，说明事实的具体内容。
have been affected by 是现在完成时被动语态，强调这一影响持续至今。
20 pars 为原文拼写（应为 20 years 的笔误），保留原文表述。

sentences.sentence: Regrettably, a vast majority of the victims of this staggering number are from developing countries.
sentences.translation: 令人遗憾的是，这一惊人数字中的绝大多数受害者来自发展中国家。

structure.text: Regrettably
a vast majority of the victims of this staggering number
are from developing countries

difficult_points: Regrettably 是评注性副词，置于句首表达作者的遗憾态度。
this staggering number 指代前一句提到的2.6亿受灾人数。

sentences.sentence: Whether it be earthquakes, tornadoes, floods, volcanoes or tsunamis, over the past twenty years, natural disasters have been happening more frequently and affecting more people than ever before.
sentences.translation: 无论是地震、龙卷风、洪水、火山喷发还是海啸，在过去二十年里，自然灾害发生的频率越来越高，影响的人数也比以往任何时候都多。

structure.text: Whether it be earthquakes, tornadoes, floods, volcanoes or tsunamis
over the past twenty years
natural disasters have been happening more frequently and affecting more people than ever before
than ever before

difficult_points: Whether it be...是让步状语从句，it 为虚义主语，be 为虚拟语气动词原形，列举各类自然灾害。
have been happening 和 affecting 是并列的现在完成进行时结构，强调持续至今且仍在发展的趋势。
than ever before 表示比以往任何时候都……，用于加强比较级。

sentences.sentence: It follows that the international community should address the issue of 'disaster preparedness' and establish a process by which natural disasters are dealt with.
sentences.translation: 由此可见，国际社会应当着手解决“备灾”问题，并建立一套应对自然灾害的处理机制。

structure.text: It follows
that the international community should address the issue of 'disaster preparedness' and establish a process by which natural disasters are dealt with
should address the issue of 'disaster preparedness'
and establish a process
by which natural disasters are dealt with

difficult_points: It follows that...是固定句型，表示由此可见/因此……，It 是形式主语。
should address...and establish...是并列谓语，共享主语 the international community。
by which natural disasters are dealt with 是定语从句，修饰 process，介词 by 提前。

sentences.sentence: On December 26, 2004, a massive earthquake centered off the coast of the Indonesian island of Sumatra caused a series of deadly tsunamis in the Indian Ocean.
sentences.translation: 2004年12月26日，一场震中位于印度尼西亚苏门答腊岛近海的大地震，在印度洋引发了一系列致命海啸。

structure.text: On December 26, 2004
a massive earthquake
centered off the coast of the Indonesian island of Sumatra
caused
a series of deadly tsunamis in the Indian Ocean

difficult_points: centered off the coast of...是过去分词短语，修饰 earthquake，说明地震的震中位置。
a series of 表示一系列，修饰 deadly tsunamis。

sentences.sentence: The damage from this extraordinary disaster was estimated to be in the vicinity of US $ 13 billion – the equivalent to the combined GDP 1 of the world's developing countries for an entire year.
sentences.translation: 这场非同寻常的灾难所造成的损失估计接近130亿美元，相当于全世界发展中国家整整一年的国内生产总值总和。

structure.text: The damage from this extraordinary disaster
was estimated
to be in the vicinity of US $ 13 billion
the equivalent to the combined GDP 1 of the world's developing countries for an entire year

difficult_points: was estimated to be 是被动语态，表示被估计为……。
in the vicinity of 表示大约、接近，用于修饰数字。
破折号后的 the equivalent to...是对前面损失金额的同位说明，GDP 后的数字1 是脚注标记。

sentences.sentence: In a matter of seconds, the tsunami waves wiped out the long years of struggle for development, and the world was once again reminded of the fearsome and destructive power of natural disasters.
sentences.translation: 短短几秒钟内，海啸巨浪就摧毁了这些国家多年发展的努力成果，世界再次意识到自然灾害那令人畏惧的破坏力。

structure.text: In a matter of seconds
the tsunami waves wiped out the long years of struggle for development
and the world was once again reminded of the fearsome and destructive power of natural disasters

difficult_points: In a matter of seconds 表示仅仅几秒钟内，强调灾难发生之迅速。
was reminded of 是被动语态，表示世界再次被提醒自然灾害的破坏力。

sentences.sentence: 1 Gross Domestic Product is the total value of goods and services produced by a country in a year.
sentences.translation: 1 国内生产总值是指一个国家一年内所生产的商品和服务的总价值。

structure.text: Gross Domestic Product
is
the total value of goods and services produced by a country in a year
produced by a country in a year

difficult_points: 句首数字 1 是与正文中 GDP 后上标数字对应的脚注标记，此句是对 GDP 概念的注释说明。
produced by a country in a year 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 goods and services。

sentences.sentence: The United Nations designated the 1990s as the International Decade for Natural Disaster Reduction, and has been active in promoting and developing international cooperation on disaster preparedness.
sentences.translation: 联合国将20世纪90年代定为“国际减少自然灾害十年”，并一直积极推动和发展备灾方面的国际合作。

structure.text: The United Nations
designated the 1990s as the International Decade for Natural Disaster Reduction
and has been active in promoting and developing international cooperation on disaster preparedness
promoting and developing international cooperation on disaster preparedness

difficult_points: designate...as...表示将……定为/指定为……。
has been active in doing 是现在完成时，强调联合国这一努力持续至今。

sentences.sentence: The UN's Yokohama Strategy for a Safer World: Guidelines for Natural Disaster Prevention, Preparedness and Mitigation was adopted in 1994.
sentences.translation: 联合国《建设更安全世界的横滨战略：自然灾害预防、备灾与减灾指南》于1994年通过。

structure.text: The UN's Yokohama Strategy for a Safer World: Guidelines for Natural Disaster Prevention, Preparedness and Mitigation
was adopted

difficult_points: 冒号后的内容是对该战略文件全名的补充说明，与主语构成一个完整的文件标题。
was adopted 是被动语态，表示该战略被通过、被采纳。

sentences.sentence: Among the guidelines, developing countries are encouraged to organise and implement their domestic resources for disaster reduction activities and donor developed countries are encouraged to give greater priority to disaster prevention, mitigation and preparedness in their assistance programs and budgets, including through increasing financial contributions.
sentences.translation: 在这些指南中，发展中国家被鼓励组织并调动本国资源用于减灾活动，而作为援助方的发达国家则被鼓励在援助项目和预算中优先考虑防灾、减灾与备灾工作，包括通过增加资金投入来实现。

structure.text: Among the guidelines
developing countries are encouraged to organise and implement their domestic resources for disaster reduction activities
to organise and implement their domestic resources for disaster reduction activities
and donor developed countries are encouraged to give greater priority to disaster prevention, mitigation and preparedness in their assistance programs and budgets
to give greater priority to disaster prevention, mitigation and preparedness in their assistance programs and budgets
including through increasing financial contributions

difficult_points: 两个 are encouraged to do 并列，分别说明对发展中国家和发达国家的不同要求。
give greater priority to 表示优先考虑……，是常见的政策类表达。
including through increasing financial contributions 补充说明实现优先考虑的具体方式之一是增加资金投入。

sentences.sentence: In January, 2005 the UN World Conference on Disaster Reduction (WCDR) met in Kobe, Hyogo Prefecture to discuss and debate how the international community should address issues of disaster preparedness and mitigation.
sentences.translation: 2005年1月，联合国世界减灾大会（WCDR）在日本兵库县神户市召开，讨论国际社会应如何应对备灾与减灾问题。

structure.text: In January, 2005
the UN World Conference on Disaster Reduction (WCDR)
met
in Kobe, Hyogo Prefecture
to discuss and debate how the international community should address issues of disaster preparedness and mitigation
how the international community should address issues of disaster preparedness and mitigation

difficult_points: to discuss and debate...是不定式作目的状语，说明大会召开的目的。
how 引导的从句作 discuss and debate 的宾语，说明讨论的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: The meeting itself attended by over 4,000 delegates representing some 168 countries occurred almost 10 years to the day after the Great Hanshin earthquake in Kobe.
sentences.translation: 此次会议共有来自约168个国家的4000多名代表出席，会议召开的日子几乎恰好是神户阪神大地震十周年当天。

structure.text: The meeting itself
attended by over 4,000 delegates representing some 168 countries
representing some 168 countries
occurred
almost 10 years to the day after the Great Hanshin earthquake in Kobe

difficult_points: attended by...是过去分词短语，插入主语和谓语之间，修饰 meeting，说明与会人数与代表国家数。
representing some 168 countries 是现在分词短语，修饰 delegates。
10 years to the day 表示恰好十年整，强调时间上的精确巧合。

sentences.sentence: The January meeting of the WCDR in Kobe provided experts and scientists from over 150 countries, government officials, Non- Government Organisation(NGOs) and United Nations representatives an opportunity to review the Yokohama Strategy.
sentences.translation: 1月在神户举行的这次WCDR会议，为来自150多个国家的专家学者、政府官员、非政府组织（NGO）代表和联合国代表提供了一个审视《横滨战略》的机会。

structure.text: The January meeting of the WCDR in Kobe
provided
experts and scientists from over 150 countries, government officials, Non- Government Organisation(NGOs) and United Nations representatives
an opportunity to review the Yokohama Strategy
to review the Yokohama Strategy

difficult_points: provide sb sth 是双宾语结构，sb 为一长串并列的人员/机构名单，sth 为 an opportunity。
to review the Yokohama Strategy 是不定式短语，修饰 opportunity，说明机会的具体内容。
Non- Government Organisation(NGOs) 为原文拼写形式，指非政府组织。

expressions.text: provide sb an opportunity to do
expressions.meaning_zh: 为某人提供做某事的机会

sentences.sentence: It recorded on the 2005-15 Yokohama Strategy Action Plan that participant countries and agencies should work over the next 10 years to reduce vulnerability to natural disasters.
sentences.translation: 《2005-2015年横滨战略行动计划》记录到，参与国和相关机构应在未来十年内共同努力，以降低面对自然灾害的脆弱性。

structure.text: It recorded on the 2005-15 Yokohama Strategy Action Plan
that participant countries and agencies should work over the next 10 years to reduce vulnerability to natural disasters
to reduce vulnerability to natural disasters

difficult_points: It recorded on...that...中 It 指代该行动计划文件本身，recorded on 表示记录在……上，that 引出记录的具体内容。
to reduce vulnerability to natural disasters 是不定式作目的状语，说明各国共同努力的目标。

sentences.sentence: The Action Plan encourages as a first step, the integration of disaster prevention programs in all development and policy-making plaits for all countries.
sentences.translation: 该行动计划鼓励各国将备灾方案纳入所有发展与决策规划之中，并将此作为第一步。

structure.text: The Action Plan
encourages
as a first step
the integration of disaster prevention programs in all development and policy-making plaits for all countries

difficult_points: as a first step 是插入语，说明纳入减灾方案是行动计划建议的第一步措施。
the integration of...in...是动词 integrate 的名词化表达，表示将……纳入……。
plaits 为原文拼写（应为 plans 的笔误），保留原文表述。

sentences.sentence: Jim Edgeland, UN representative stated,"Disaster risk reduction is not an additional expense – it is an essential investment in our common future, but the benefits of this investment will be calculated not only in dollars or euros or yen saved, but most importantly, in saved lives in every corner of the globe."
sentences.translation: 联合国代表吉姆·埃奇兰德表示：“减少灾害风险并非额外的开支，而是对我们共同未来的一项必要投资；这项投资带来的收益，不仅将以节省下来的美元、欧元或日元来衡量，更重要的是，还将以在世界每一个角落挽救的生命来衡量。”

structure.text: Jim Edgeland, UN representative
stated

"Disaster risk reduction is not an additional expense – it is an essential investment in our common future, but the benefits of this investment will be calculated not only in dollars or euros or yen saved, but most importantly, in saved lives in every corner of the globe."
Disaster risk reduction is not an additional expense
it is an essential investment in our common future
but the benefits of this investment will be calculated not only in dollars or euros or yen saved, but most importantly, in saved lives in every corner of the globe

difficult_points: UN representative 是 Jim Edgeland 的同位语，说明其身份。
not only...but (most importantly)...是并列结构，强调不仅……更重要的是……。
dollars or euros or yen saved 中 saved 是过去分词，后置修饰前面的三种货币，表示节省下来的。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps the most significant work done at the WCDR meetings was the drafting and adoption of the Hyogo Declaration, This document expresses the united determination of the international community to rely not only on advanced technology or facilities for disaster preparedness, but on a people-centered early warning system.
sentences.translation: WCDR会议上或许最重要的成果，是《兵库宣言》的起草与通过，该文件表达了国际社会的一致决心——备灾不仅要依靠先进的技术和设施，更要依靠以人为本的预警系统。

structure.text: Perhaps the most significant work done at the WCDR meetings
done at the WCDR meetings
was
the drafting and adoption of the Hyogo Declaration
This document expresses the united determination of the international community
to rely not only on advanced technology or facilities for disaster preparedness, but on a people-centered early warning system

difficult_points: done at the WCDR meetings 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 work。
逗号后 This document...原文缺少句号，属于逗号连接两个独立分句的笔误，保留原文表述。
not only...but...结构中的 to rely 是不定式短语，修饰 determination，说明决心的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: The people-centered system requires effective communication and education in the building of disaster-resilient countries and communities.
sentences.translation: 这种以人为本的预警系统，需要在建设具有抗灾能力的国家和社区过程中开展有效的沟通与教育。

structure.text: The people-centered system
requires
effective communication and education
in the building of disaster-resilient countries and communities

difficult_points: the building of...是动名词短语，作介词 in 的宾语，表示建设……的过程中。
disaster-resilient 是复合形容词，表示具有抗灾韧性的。

sentences.sentence: As the intergovernmental panels of the WCDR were meeting, the Great Hanshin-Awaji Earthquake Forum was also underway.
sentences.translation: 在WCDR政府间会议召开的同时，阪神淡路大地震论坛也同步进行。

structure.text: As the intergovernmental panels of the WCDR were meeting
the Great Hanshin-Awaji Earthquake Forum was also underway

difficult_points: As 引导时间状语从句，表示与……同时，were meeting 是过去进行时。
underway 是表语形容词，表示正在进行中。

sentences.sentence: The earthquake measuring a magnitude of 7.3, led to the Joss of over 6,400 lives and widespread destruction affecting some 460,000 households.
sentences.translation: 这场里氏7.3级的地震，造成6400多人遇难，并带来波及约46万户家庭的大规模破坏。

structure.text: The earthquake
measuring a magnitude of 7.3
led to
the Joss of over 6,400 lives and widespread destruction
affecting some 460,000 households

difficult_points: measuring a magnitude of 7.3 是现在分词短语，修饰 earthquake，说明地震的震级。
Joss 为原文拼写（应为 loss 的笔误），保留原文表述。
affecting some 460,000 households 是现在分词短语，修饰 destruction，说明破坏波及的范围。

sentences.sentence: This public forum offered a variety of sessions, during which the lessons learned from the disastrous earthquake were discussed.
sentences.translation: 这场公众论坛设有多场分会，与会者在会上讨论了从这场灾难性地震中汲取的经验教训。

structure.text: This public forum
offered
a variety of sessions
during which the lessons learned from the disastrous earthquake were discussed
learned from the disastrous earthquake

difficult_points: during which...是介词加 which 引导的定语从句，修饰 sessions，which 指代这些分会。
learned from the disastrous earthquake 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 lessons。

sentences.sentence: Earthquake expert Professor Tomohiro Kawata said,"Because this disaster happened over a decade ago, the memory of the devastation can be forgotten.
sentences.translation: 地震专家河田惠昭教授说：“因为这场灾难发生在十多年前，人们对这场浩劫的记忆可能会逐渐淡忘。

structure.text: Earthquake expert Professor Tomohiro Kawata
said
"Because this disaster happened over a decade ago, the memory of the devastation can be forgotten.
Because this disaster happened over a decade ago
the memory of the devastation can be forgotten

difficult_points: Earthquake expert Professor Tomohiro Kawata 中 Earthquake expert 与 Professor Tomohiro Kawata 是同位关系，共同说明说话人身份。
Because 引导原因状语从句，说明记忆可能被淡忘的原因。
can be forgotten 是被动语态，表示这段记忆可能会被忘记。

sentences.sentence: Part of our gathering here today is to make sure that we do not forget what happened back in 1995.''
sentences.translation: 我们今天在此聚会的部分意义，就在于确保我们不会忘记1995年发生的事情。”

structure.text: Part of our gathering here today
is
to make sure that we do not forget what happened back in 1995
that we do not forget what happened back in 1995
what happened back in 1995

difficult_points: make sure that...后接宾语从句，从句中又嵌套了 what 引导的宾语从句 what happened back in 1995。
句末的两个单引号是对前面双引号所引话语的呼应式收尾，属于原文排版上的不一致，保留原文表述。

sentences.sentence: Also included were some personal stories from the earthquake victims themselves.
sentences.translation: 论坛上还包括了一些地震受害者亲口讲述的个人故事。

structure.text: Also included
were
some personal stories from the earthquake victims themselves

difficult_points: 全句为倒装结构，正常语序应为 Some personal stories...were also included，表语提前使叙述更连贯地衔接上文。
themselves 强化 the earthquake victims，强调故事是受害者本人讲述的。

sentences.sentence: Earthquake victim Kumiko Nagota told attendees that her house collapsed in the Kobe earthquake and she was trapped under it.
sentences.translation: 地震受害者永田久美子告诉与会者，她的房子在神户地震中倒塌，她被困在废墟之下。

structure.text: Earthquake victim Kumiko Nagota
told attendees
that her house collapsed in the Kobe earthquake and she was trapped under it
her house collapsed in the Kobe earthquake
and she was trapped under it

difficult_points: Earthquake victim Kumiko Nagota 中 Earthquake victim 是同位语，说明其身份。
that 引导的宾语从句内部又包含 and 连接的两个并列分句。
it 指代前面的 her house。

sentences.sentence: She tried to call for help but after a while she lost her voice and just had to wait there until help came.
sentences.translation: 她试图呼救，但过了一会儿她的嗓子哑了，只能在原地等待救援到来。

structure.text: She tried to call for help
to call for help
but after a while she lost her voice
after a while
and just had to wait there until help came
until help came

difficult_points: call for help 表示呼救，to call for help 是不定式作 tried 的宾语。
until help came 是时间状语从句，说明等待这一动作持续的终点。

sentences.sentence: Attendees were told of bow the town mobilised to facilitate recovery and reconstruction.
sentences.translation: 与会者了解到这座城镇是如何动员起来以促进灾后恢复与重建的。

structure.text: Attendees
were told of
bow the town mobilised to facilitate recovery and reconstruction
to facilitate recovery and reconstruction

difficult_points: were told of 是被动语态，表示与会者被告知某事。
bow 为原文拼写（应为 how 的笔误），引导宾语从句，说明动员的方式。
to facilitate recovery and reconstruction 是不定式作目的状语，说明动员的目的。

sentences.sentence: An exhibition hall showed pictures of mounds of rubble produced by the earthquake as well as a display of objects donated by earthquake victims including a broken clock and a child's toy that molted in the fires caused by the earthquake.
sentences.translation: 展览厅展出了地震造成的废墟瓦砾堆的照片，以及地震受害者捐赠的物品展览，其中包括一只破损的时钟和一件在地震引发的大火中熔化的儿童玩具。

structure.text: An exhibition hall
showed
pictures of mounds of rubble produced by the earthquake
produced by the earthquake
as well as a display of objects donated by earthquake victims
donated by earthquake victims
including a broken clock and a child's toy
that molted in the fires caused by the earthquake
caused by the earthquake

difficult_points: produced by the earthquake 和 donated by earthquake victims 分别是过去分词短语，修饰 rubble 和 objects。
including...引出展品的具体例子。
that molted in the fires...是定语从句，修饰 a child's toy，molted 为原文拼写（应为 melted 的笔误）。

sentences.sentence: Said Kawata, "As well as being a memorial, our facility and, indeed this forum, is a place to learn from earthquake experiences and incorporate the things we learned into our preparations for future disasters".
sentences.translation: 河田说：“我们的设施——事实上，包括这场论坛本身——不仅是一座纪念场所，更是一个从地震经历中学习、并将所学融入未来防灾准备的地方。”

structure.text: Said Kawata
"As well as being a memorial, our facility and, indeed this forum, is a place to learn from earthquake experiences and incorporate the things we learned into our preparations for future disasters"
As well as being a memorial
our facility and, indeed this forum, is a place
to learn from earthquake experiences and incorporate the things we learned into our preparations for future disasters
we learned

difficult_points: Said Kawata 是引语前置的倒装结构，正常语序为 Kawata said。
indeed this forum 是插入语，补充说明我们的设施也包括这场论坛本身。
the things we learned 中间省略了关系代词 that，完整为 the things (that) we learned。

sentences.sentence: During the forum, it was agreed that in May 2005, a new hub for the coordination of international disaster recovery support activities wrould be established in Kobe.
sentences.translation: 论坛期间，与会者一致同意，将于2005年5月在神户设立一个新的国际救灾恢复支持活动协调中心。

structure.text: During the forum
it was agreed
that in May 2005, a new hub for the coordination of international disaster recovery support activities wrould be established in Kobe
in May 2005
a new hub for the coordination of international disaster recovery support activities
wrould be established in Kobe

difficult_points: it was agreed that...是形式主语结构，it 代替真正的主语——后面的 that 从句。
for the coordination of...是介词短语，修饰 hub，说明该协调中心的职能。
wrould 为原文拼写（应为 would 的笔误），保留原文表述。
